question.question_text: What will the EUR/USD exchange rate be on 2026-03-27 (or the next available trading day)?

prediction.reasoning: Assuming a random walk model for EUR/USD, the point estimate is the current rate. Confidence intervals are derived by estimating typical daily volatility for a major currency pair (approximating daily standard deviation at 0.0045).
